bio: Mohammad Reza Ashtiani served as Minister of Defense under [Ebrahim Raisi](/people/ebrahim-raisi) from 2021 to 2024. A senior military officer, he previously served as Deputy Chief of Staff of the Iranian Armed Forces. He oversaw a period of accelerated missile and drone program development, including the April 2024 direct Iranian attack on Israel. He was replaced by [Aziz Nasirzadeh](/people/aziz-nasirzadeh) under [Masoud Pezeshkian](/people/masoud-pezeshkian).
editorial_notes: Born 1960. Senior Artesh officer, not IRGC. Deputy Chief of Staff before appointment. Replaced by Nasirzadeh in August 2024.
